title: Australian DVD Release old news
wikitext:
[]: Australian DVD Release (old news)             Quote Post by V » Mon Nov 10, 2008 7:07 pm http://www.red-ant.com.au/ProductFamily.aspx?pf=2832 is this real? or is this for the Australian release? EDIT: Nevermind, it is indeed the Australian release and this is old news: http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/news/2008-02-09/australias-red-ant-to-release-evangelion-1.0-on-dvd

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Mon Nov 10, 2008 7:17 pm I believe its real, and Zeak's talked about having a copy of it or something.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Mon Nov 10, 2008 10:44 pm HOORRAAAYY, Australia gets something first for once. (went and bought it today, couldn't resist)

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Nov 11, 2008 1:49 am Yeah, I'm pretty sure I'm buying this version instead of waiting for an American release.

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Tue Nov 11, 2008 2:52 am Fazmotron wrote: HOORRAAAYY, Australia gets something first for once. (went and bought it today, couldn't resist)

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Tue Nov 11, 2008 10:27 am Why is it PG? There's boobs in this! Awesome cover though...

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue Nov 11, 2008 11:08 am Yeah, nice cover. I'm sure the U.S. cover will be horrible when compared to this and the German releases.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Nov 11, 2008 1:28 pm master_lloyd wrote: Why is it PG? There's boobs in this!

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Tue Nov 11, 2008 2:23 pm In germany Evangelion 1.01 has a FSK-12 rating... so you have to be at least 12 years old :P .... similar to pg-13. The first platinum disc had a FSK-6... the rest also FSK-12. D&R/EoE both had FSK-16.

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Tue Nov 11, 2008 2:45 pm Oh I'm not prudish, or American, I just thought it seemed odd. Although I suppose Film Classifications are getting laxer nowadays. And I doubt the Australian Film Board care too much about "a cartoon Sheila gettin' her wangers out" (sorry I couldn't resist!).

[]:             Quote Post by jim_loves_randy » Tue Nov 11, 2008 5:22 pm Wow, that should be like, the official cover/poster for Rebuild.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Nov 12, 2008 12:41 pm Maybe I shouldn't bother waiting for the inevitable super-duper extras Rebuild boxset that would be re-re-released several times by Gainax.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Wed Nov 12, 2008 1:38 pm anyone know how id get this over here in the states?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Nov 13, 2008 8:15 pm EvaCub wrote: anyone know how id get this over here in the states?
